mapper.select: SELECT /* SiteMenuMapper.getMenuAllList */ MENU_SEQ , MENU_CODE , MENU_NM , GROUP_KEY , PRNTS_KEY , ( SELECT COUNT(PRNTS_KEY) FROM NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND A.MENU_CODE = PRNTS_KEY AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND ACES_ALWD_YN = 'Y') AS NEXT_DEPTH_CNT , DEPTH_KEY , URL_ADR , REP_URL_SEQ , STAT_VAL , ACES_ALWD_YN , MENU_OUTPUT_CD , CNTPNT_CD , PLATFORM_CD , MENU_LINK_CD , MENU_STRESS_YN , MOBILE_MENU_USE_YN , APP_MENU_USE_YN , PSTNG_START_DATE , PSTNG_END_DATE , CHATBOT_TIP_SBST , CRET_ID , AMD_ID , TO_CHAR(CRET_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT , TO_CHAR(AMD_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS AMD_DT , SORT_KEY , MENU_HIER_TYPE_CD , LIST_IMG , IMG_DESC , LINK_URL_ADR , MENU_DESC , ATT_YN , FILE_PATH_NM , FILE_TYPE , FILE_CAPA , LIST_IMG2 , IMG_DESC2 , LINK_URL_ADR2 , ATT_YN2 FROM NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS A WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND ACES_ALWD_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPTH_KEY, SORT_KEY

SELECT /* SiteMenuMapper.getMenuUrlAllList */ A.URL_SEQ , URL_NM , URL , META_DESC , META_KYWRD , CNTPNT_CD , PLATFORM_CD , URL_DIV_CD , LOGIN_MUST_YN , STAT_LDUP_YN , AI_RECO_SHOW_YN , FLOATING_SHOW_YN , FLOATING_TIP_SBST , CHATBOT_TIP_SBST , SYS_WORK_NOTI_REG_YN , SYS_WORK_NOTI_REG_DT , B.URL_ATRIB_VAL_CD , B.USE_YN AS ATRIB_USE_YN FROM NMCP_MENU_URL_BAS A LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_MENU_URL_ATRIB_DTL B ON A.URL_SEQ = B.URL_SEQ WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.URL_SEQ ASC

SELECT /* SiteMenuMapper.getMenuAuthList */ A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_CODE , A.MENU_NM , A.GROUP_KEY , A.PRNTS_KEY , A.DEPTH_KEY , A.URL_ADR , A.REP_URL_SEQ , A.STAT_VAL , A.ACES_ALWD_YN , A.MENU_OUTPUT_CD , A.CNTPNT_CD , A.PLATFORM_CD , A.MENU_LINK_CD , A.MENU_STRESS_YN , A.MOBILE_MENU_USE_YN , A.APP_MENU_USE_YN , A.PSTNG_START_DATE , A.PSTNG_END_DATE , A.CHATBOT_TIP_SBST , A.CRET_ID , A.AMD_ID , TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT , TO_CHAR(A.AMD_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS AMD_DT , A.SORT_KEY , A.MENU_HIER_TYPE_CD , A.LIST_IMG , A.IMG_DESC , A.LINK_URL_ADR , A.MENU_DESC , A.ATT_YN , A.FILE_PATH_NM , A.FILE_TYPE , A.FILE_CAPA , A.LIST_IMG2 , A.IMG_DESC2 , A.LINK_URL_ADR2 , A.ATT_YN2 , B.AUT_GRADE_CD FROM NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS A LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_MENU_AUT_REL B ON A.MENU_SEQ = B.MENU_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND A.ACES_ALWD_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPTH_KEY, SORT_KEY
SELECT /* SiteMenuMapper.getAcesAlwdList */ ACES_ALWD_IP , NM , MOBILE_NO FROM NMCP_IP_ACES_ALWD WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y'
